creator: gondim@bsdinfo.com.br
text:
Hi all,

More information about the problem. When I do:

sysctl net.link.lagg.lacp.debug=1

I see many messages in the log:

Sep 18 15:15:10 rt01 kernel: igb4: lacpdu transmit
